leveling.failedAssignment: Failed to assign level {{level}} rewards to {{user}} (ID: {{id}}) in {{guild}}
leveling.failedMessage: Failed to send level {{level}} level up message for {{user}} (ID: {{id}}) in {{guild}}

birthday.none: You do not have a birthday set yet! Use the setup command to set your birthday.

announcement.withAge: 🎉 Happy Birthday to {{user}}! They turned {{age}} years old today! 🎂🎈

announce.none:
The birthday announcements are not set up in this server yet.
Please use the setup command for the initial configuration.
announce.already:
The birthday configuration is already set up in this server.
Please use the edit command to change the settings or reset the settings to start over.

setup.invalidChannel: The channel you provided is not valid. Please provide a valid channel.
setup.success:
Successfully set up the birthday announcements!
Birthdays will from now on be announced in {{channel}}.

edit.none: You did not provide any changes! Please provide at least one option to edit.
edit.invalidChannel: The channel you provided is not valid. Please provide a valid channel.
edit.success: Successfully updated the birthday announcement channel to {{channel}}!
edit.channelRemoved: Birthday announcements will no longer be sent.
edit.channelUpdated: Birthday announcements will now be made in {{channel}}.
edit.roleRemoved: Birthday role will no longer be assigned.
edit.roleUpdated: Birthday role has been updated to {{role}}!

toggle.success: Birthday announcements have been set to: **{{state}}**

reset.success: The birthday announcement configuration has been reset to default settings! Birthday announcements are now disabled and no channel or role is set.

setup.already: A birthday is already set! Use edit to change it or reset to delete it.
setup.invalidTimezone: The timezone you provided is not valid. Please provide a valid IANA timezone string (e.g. 'America/New_York').
setup.invalidDate: The date you provided is not valid. Please provide a valid date in the format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2000-01-01').
setup.error: An error occurred while setting your birthday. Please try again later.
setup.success: Your birthday has been set successfully!

edit.none: You did not provide any changes! Please provide at least one option to edit.
edit.error: An error occurred while editing your birthday configuration. Please try again later.
edit.success: Your birthday configuration has been updated successfully!

announceInGuild.all: Your birthday is set to be announced in all guilds where a channel is set. You cannot manage specific guilds.
announceInGuild.noneDescription: Select this to announce your birthday in no guilds.
announceInGuild.selectPlaceholder: Select guilds to announce your birthday in
announceInGuild.selectDescription: Select the guilds where you want your birthday to be announced. Your birthday will only be announced in guilds that have a birthday announcement channel set up.
announceInGuild.error: An error occurred while updating your birthday announcement guilds. Please try again later.
announceInGuild.selectFilter: This select menu is not for you!
announceInGuild.success: Your birthday announcement guilds have been updated successfully!

reset.success: Your birthday configuration has been reset successfully!

levelUp.body:
### {{username}} has leveled up!
Congratulations, you are now **level {{level}}**.

weeklyReset.message:
### Weekly XP Reset
All weekly XP has been reset to 0 and the weekly leaderboard has been cleared.
Congratulations to {{winner}} for topping the weekly XP leaderboard with {{xp}} XP!

leveling.disabled: Leveling is currently disabled or not configured in this server.

rank.state:
Showing Stats for {{user}}:
Level {{Level}} (Rank #{{rank}}), {{xp}} Total XP ({{xpIntoLevel}}/{{total}} into current level).
Weekly: Level {{weeklyLevel}} (Rank #{{weeklyRank}}), {{weeklyXP}} XP ({{xpIntoWeeklyLevel}}/{{weeklyTotal}} into current level).

leaderboard.none: No users have gained XP in this server yet!
leaderboard.title: ### {{guild}} - Leaderboard 🏆

reset.success: The leveling system has been reset to default settings!

toggle.success: The leveling system has been set to: {{state}}

channel.none: No channel was set up for level up messages!
channel.removed: The level up channel has been removed. Level up messages will be sent wherever the user levels up.
channel.already: The level up channel is already set to {{channel}}.
channel.set: The level up channel has been set to {{channel}}.
channel.alreadyIgnored: The channel {{channel}} is already in the ignored channels list.
channel.addIgnored: Added {{channel}} to the ignored channels list! Users will no longer receive XP in that channel.
channel.notIgnored: The channel {{channel}} is not in the ignored channels list.
channel.removedIgnored: Removed {{channel}} from the ignored channels list! Users will now receive XP in that channel again.
channel.addEnabled: Added {{channel}} to the enabled channels list! Users will only receive XP in enabled channels.
channel.alreadyEnabled: The channel {{channel}} is already in the enabled channels list.
channel.notEnabled: The channel {{channel}} is not in the enabled channels list.
channel.removedEnabled: Removed {{channel}} from the enabled channels list.
channel.enabledLimit: You cannot enable more than {{limit}} channels for the leveling system.
channel.ignoredLimit: You cannot ignore more than {{limit}} channels for the leveling system.

role.alreadyIgnored: The role {{role}} is already in the ignored roles list.
role.addIgnored: Added {{role}} to the ignored roles list! Users with that role will no longer receive XP.
role.notIgnored: The role {{role}} is not in the ignored roles list.
role.removedIgnored: Removed {{role}} from the ignored roles list! Users with that role will now receive XP again.
role.addEnabled: Added {{role}} to the enabled roles list! Only users with that role will receive XP.
role.alreadyEnabled: The role {{role}} is already in the enabled roles list.
role.notEnabled: The role {{role}} is not in the enabled roles list.
role.removedEnabled: Removed {{role}} from the enabled roles list.
role.enabledLimit: You cannot enable more than {{limit}} roles for the leveling system.
role.ignoredLimit: You cannot ignore more than {{limit}} roles for the leveling system.

reward.exists: That role is already set as a reward for leveling up!
reward.none: Please specify either a level or a role to remove from the leveling rewards!
reward.notFound: No reward found for level {{level}} and role {{role}}!
reward.limit: You cannot have more than {{limit}} leveling rewards configured!

counting.noConsecutive: You can't count twice in a row! Wait for someone else to count before you can count again.
counting.wrongNumber: That's not the correct number! The current count is {{number}}. Try again with the correct next number.
counting.reset: That's not the correct number! The current count was {{number}}. The count has been reset to 0.
counting.none: No counting game is currently set up for this server. Please use the setup command to create a one.

setup.already: A counting game is already set up in this server. Please use the edit command to modify the existing counting game, or reset the current game if you want to start over.
setup.success: The counting game has been set up in {{channel}}. To start counting, simply send a message with the number `1` in the counting channel. Happy counting!

edit.none: You must provide at least one option to edit the counting game configuration!
edit.success: The counting game configuration has been updated successfully! Use the info command to view the current settings.

resetConfiguration.success: The counting game configuration has been reset to default settings!

reactionRole.none: No reaction role menus are configured for this server.
reactionRole.notFound: Could not find that reaction role menu.
reactionRole.subcommand:
### Unknown subcommand
Please select a valid subcommand for managing reaction role menus.

toggle.all: All reaction role menus have been {{state}}
toggle.single: The reaction role menu {{id}} has been {{state}}.
toggle.function: The message will function as a reaction role menu.
toggle.noFunction: The message will no longer function as a reaction role menu, but it will not be deleted.

delete.success: The reaction role menu has been deleted. The message will no longer function, but it will not be deleted.

resend.channel: Could not find or access the target channel. Please check the channel and my permissions.
resend.failed: Failed to resend the reaction role menu message. Please make sure I have permission to send messages in {{channel}}.
resend.success: The reaction role menu message has been resent to {{channel}} successfully.

message.title: Role Menu
message.description: Click the buttons below to claim your roles!

setup.timeout: ⏱️ *This interaction has timed out. Please run the command again to start over.*
setup.maximum:
You have reached the maximum number of reaction role menus ({{total}}).
Please delete an existing menu before creating a new one.
setup.complete:
### Setup Complete
The reaction role menu has successfully been created in {{channel}} and saved!
setup.invalidChannel: Could not find or access the target channel. Please check the channel and my permissions.
setup.rolePlaceholder: Select a role to add to the reaction role menu
setup.channelPlaceholder: Select a channel to post the reaction role menu in
setup.step5:
### Step 5: Emoji Pairing ({{current}}/{{total}})

Please react to **this message** with the emoji you want to pair with the role {{role}}.
setup.step4:
### Step 4: Menu Roles

Select the roles you want users to be able to claim from the reaction role menu.
You can select a total of {{total}} different roles.
setup.step3:
### Step 3: Target Channel

Select the channel where you want the reaction role menu to be posted by the bot.
setup.step2:
### Step 2: Required Roles

Select any roles that users must have to be able to claim roles from the reaction role menu.
You can select a total of {{total}} different roles.
This step is optional, you can skip it if you don't want any requirements.
setup.step1:
### Step 1: Selection Mode

Should this reaction menu allow users to select only one role, or multiple roles at once?

select.assigned: You have been assigned the {{role}} role.
